research.domain: Artificial Intelligence, Education Technology, Recommendation Systems
research.description: PathReco AI is an AI-powered domain-specific course recommendation system designed to provide personalized learning pathways based on user interests, existing skills, and career goals. The system combines Sentence-BERT semantic embeddings with Knowledge Graphs to recommend relevant learning resources and courses from curated educational datasets.

researchPaper.title: PathReco: AI-Powered Domain-Specific Course Recommendation System Using Sentence-BERT and Knowledge Graphs
researchPaper.journal: International Journal of Scientific Research in Science and Technology (IJSRST)
researchPaper.abstract: The research proposes an intelligent recommendation system that combines Sentence-BERT semantic similarity with Knowledge Graph relationships to generate personalized learning pathways. The system analyzes user interests, skills, and career objectives to recommend relevant courses, helping learners navigate educational resources more effectively.
contributions: Designed the overall recommendation system architecture.
Implemented semantic similarity matching using Sentence-BERT.
Built the complete Flask-based web application.
Conducted experimentation, testing, and evaluation of recommendation accuracy.

patent.title: INDIPATHRECO: AI-Powered Domain-Specific Course Recommendation System Using Knowledge Graphs and BERT-Based Semantic Analysis
patent.description: A novel AI-powered recommendation framework utilizing Knowledge Graphs and BERT-based semantic analysis to provide intelligent domain-specific course recommendations and personalized learning pathways.

copyright.title: Path Reco: AI Powered Domain Specific Course Recommendation for Online Learning Platforms
copyright.description: Copyright registration protecting the software design, recommendation methodology, implementation, and associated intellectual property of the PathReco AI platform.

achievements: Integrated Sentence-BERT with Knowledge Graph-based Recommendations

institution.college: Finolex Academy of Management and Technology
